characters.description: The narrator, packed into the family van for a summer road trip he never asked for. His journal records every wrong turn, bad stop, and fresh disaster along the way.
characters.name: Greg Heffley

characters.description: Greg's mother, the architect of the road trip, who insists on a spontaneous, screen-free journey full of wholesome family activities and holds to the dream long after the trip has gone sideways.
characters.name: Susan Heffley

characters.description: Greg's father, who does the driving and absorbs most of the trip's mechanical and logistical punishment.
characters.name: Frank Heffley

characters.description: Greg's teenage older brother, crammed into the van with everyone else and no happier about it than Greg is.
characters.name: Rodrick Heffley

characters.description: Greg's toddler brother, whose souvenir from a county fair stop - a live pig - joins the family for the rest of the trip.
characters.name: Manny Heffley
